posts.text: On this day 2019, intense spaniel action.

Can’t believe you left out her gynecological sleuthing of French first “ladies.” Her skills are transatlantic (no pun intended).


Social distancing champ (@LadyGriz)

-She thinks dinosaurs are fake. 
-She doesn't believe the Earth is round.
-Has no idea about the connection between thunder and lightning.
-Has no idea at what temperature water freezes.
But can outsmart the entire FBI, world governments, and international assassins 😂





— https://nitter.net/LadyGriz/status/2035066036798857548#m

Commodity prices, how do they work?


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

Trump: “We don’t use the Strait. We don’t need it”

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/atrupar/status/2035080606766244121#m
I generally find @charlescwcooke’s accent euphonious. But the way he pronounces “Candace” grates on me: “Canned Ace.”
My flight out of New Orleans now delayed 3+ hours. So, where should I eat at MSY?

“Good morning. It’s Friday. I got to sleep late. We miss thumbguy but he plays favorites with Zoe who likes to get up early. I like to ease into my morning like it’s a dog bed. I also like barking in every direction after a good meal. I just do. Also, I love you.”

[Archival]
“Good morning. It’s Friday. Don’t be frightened by my collar. It’s for scaring away mean dogs. At least that’s what they told me. Also, I love you.”
I forgot I’ve had an account here since 2023. Kicking the tires now.
Giving this a whirl. This is my first Bluesky post and, yes, I'm tweeting pictures of my dogs. Don't say you weren't warned.
